abort.already_configured: This Tracearr instance is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Tracearr instance. Please check the host URL.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your credentials.

reauth_confirm.description: Please enter a new API key for your Tracearr instance. You can find this under Settings → API in the Tracearr web UI.

user.description: Enter the URL and API key for your Tracearr instance. The API key can be found under Settings → API in the Tracearr web UI.
